desc.en: The target is stabbed with a tentacle, arm, or the like steeped in poison. This may also poison the target.
desc.es: Pincha al objetivo con un tentáculo o brazo envenenado. Puede llegar a envenenar al objetivo.

shortDesc: Teaches certain Pokemon the move Poison Jab. One use.

desc.en: The user releases a horrible aura imbued with dark thoughts. This may also make the target flinch.
desc.es: Libera una horrible aura llena de malos pensamientos que puede amedrentar al objetivo.

shortDesc: Teaches certain Pokemon the move Dark Pulse. One use.

desc.en: The user slams a barrage of hard-shelled seeds down on the target from above.
desc.es: Lanza al objetivo una descarga de semillas explosivas desde arriba.

shortDesc: Teaches certain Pokemon the move Seed Bomb. One use.

desc.en: The user slashes at the target by crossing its scythes or claws as if they were a pair of scissors.
desc.es: Cruza las guadañas o las garras para atacar al objetivo como si fueran unas tijeras.

shortDesc: Teaches certain Pokemon the move X-Scissor. One use.

desc.en: The user generates a damaging sound wave by vibration. This may also lower the target’s Sp. Def stat.
desc.es: El usuario crea una onda sónica dañina moviendo su cuerpo que también puede disminuir la Defensa Especial del objetivo.

shortDesc: Teaches certain Pokemon the move Bug Buzz. One use.

desc.en: The target is attacked with a shock wave generated by the user’s gaping mouth.
desc.es: Abre mucho la boca y libera una onda de choque que ataca al objetivo.

shortDesc: Teaches certain Pokemon the move Dragon Pulse. One use.

desc.en: The user attacks with a ray of light that sparkles as if it were made of gemstones.
desc.es: Ataca con un rayo de luz que centellea como si lo  formaran miles de joyas.

shortDesc: Teaches certain Pokemon the move Power Gem. One use.

desc.en: The user heightens its mental focus and unleashes its power. This may also lower the target’s Sp. Def stat.
desc.es: Agudiza la concentración mental y libera su poder.  Puede disminuir la Defensa Especial del objetivo.

shortDesc: Teaches certain Pokemon the move Focus Blast. One use.

desc.en: The user draws power from nature and fires it at the target. This may also lower the target’s Sp. Def stat.
desc.es: Aúna fuerzas de la naturaleza y libera su ataque. Puede disminuir la Defensa Especial del objetivo.

shortDesc: Teaches certain Pokemon the move Energy Ball. One use.

desc.en: The user tucks in its wings and charges from a low altitude. This also damages the user quite a lot.
desc.es: Pliega sus alas y ataca con un vuelo rasante. El Pokémon que lo usa también resulta seriamente dañado.

shortDesc: Teaches certain Pokemon the move Brave Bird. One use.

desc.en: The user makes the ground under the target erupt with power. This may also lower the target’s Sp. Def stat.
desc.es: La tierra a los pies del objetivo erupciona violentamente. Puede disminuir la Defensa Especial del objetivo.

shortDesc: Teaches certain Pokemon the move Earth Power. One use.

desc.en: The user stimulates its brain by thinking bad thoughts. This sharply raises the user’s Sp. Atk stat.
desc.es: Estimula su cerebro pensando en cosas malas. Aumenta mucho el Ataque Especial.

shortDesc: Teaches certain Pokemon the move Nasty Plot. One use.

desc.en: The user focuses its willpower to its head and attacks the target. This may also make the target flinch.
desc.es: Concentra su energía psíquica en la cabeza para golpear. Puede hacer que el objetivo se amedrente.

shortDesc: Teaches certain Pokemon the move Zen Headbutt. One use.

desc.en: The user gathers all its light energy and releases it all at once. This may also lower the target’s Sp. Def stat.
desc.es: El usuario concentra toda la luz del cuerpo y la libera. Puede bajar la Defensa Especial del objetivo.

shortDesc: Teaches certain Pokemon the move Flash Cannon. One use.

desc.en: The user whips up a storm of leaves around the target. The attack’s recoil harshly lowers the user’s Sp. Atk stat.
desc.es: Envuelve al objetivo con una lluvia de hojas afiladas, pero reduce mucho su Ataque Especial.

shortDesc: Teaches certain Pokemon the move Leaf Storm. One use.

desc.en: The user violently whirls its vines, tentacles, or the like to harshly lash the target.
desc.es: El usuario agita violentamente sus lianas o tentáculos para golpear al objetivo.

shortDesc: Teaches certain Pokemon the move Power Whip. One use.

desc.en: The user shoots filthy garbage at the target to attack. This may also poison the target.
desc.es: Lanza contra el objetivo basura asquerosa y puede envenenarlo.

shortDesc: Teaches certain Pokemon the move Gunk Shot. One use.

desc.en: The user slams the target with its steel-hard head. This may also make the target flinch.
desc.es: Ataca con su dura cabeza de hierro. Puede hacer que el objetivo se amedrente.

shortDesc: Teaches certain Pokemon the move Iron Head. One use.

desc.en: The user stabs the target from below with sharpened stones. Critical hits land more easily.
desc.es: Clava piedras muy afiladas al objetivo. Suele ser crítico.

shortDesc: Teaches certain Pokemon the move Stone Edge. One use.

desc.en: The user lays a trap of levitating stones around the opposing team. The trap hurts opposing Pokémon that switch into battle.
desc.es: Una trampa de rocas que flota en el aire y daña a los objetivos que entran en combate.

shortDesc: Teaches certain Pokemon the move Stealth Rock. One use.

desc.en: The user snares the target with grass and trips it. The heavier the target, the greater the move’s power.
desc.es: Enreda al objetivo con hierba y lo derriba. Cuanto más pesado es el objetivo, más daño inflige.

shortDesc: Teaches certain Pokemon the move Grass Knot. One use.

desc.en: The user strikes everything around it by swamping the area with a giant sludge wave. This may also poison those hit.
desc.es: Una onda tóxica que daña a los Pokémon de alrededor. Puede envenenar.

shortDesc: Teaches certain Pokemon the move Sludge Wave. One use.

desc.en: The user slams into the target with its heavy body. The more the user outweighs the target, the greater the move’s power.
desc.es: El usuario golpea con todo su cuerpo. Cuanto mayor sea su peso comparado con el del objetivo, más daño causará.

shortDesc: Teaches certain Pokemon the move Heavy Slam. One use.

desc.en: The user hurls an electric orb at the target. The faster the user is than the target, the greater the move’s power.
desc.es: Lanza una bola eléctrica. Cuanto mayor sea la Velocidad del usuario en comparación con la del objetivo, mayor será el daño causado.

shortDesc: Teaches certain Pokemon the move Electro Ball. One use.

desc.en: The user turns the target’s power against it. The higher the target’s Attack stat, the greater the damage it deals.
desc.es: El usuario emplea la fuerza del objetivo para atacarlo. Cuanto mayor es el Ataque del objetivo, más daño provoca.

shortDesc: Teaches certain Pokemon the move Foul Play. One use.

desc.en: The user attacks the target with stored power. The more the user’s stats are raised, the greater the move’s power.
desc.es: Acumula poder para golpear. Cuanto más suban las características del usuario, mayor será el daño.

shortDesc: Teaches certain Pokemon the move Stored Power. One use.

desc.en: The user teleports using a strange power and switches places with one of its allies.
desc.es: Extraño poder que intercambia la posición del usuario con la de un aliado sobre el terreno de combate.

shortDesc: Teaches certain Pokemon the move Ally Switch. One use.

desc.en: The user shoots boiling hot water at its target. This may also leave the target with a burn.
desc.es: Ataca arrojando agua hirviendo al objetivo. Puede causar quemaduras.

shortDesc: Teaches certain Pokemon the move Scald. One use.

desc.en: The user is roused, and its Attack and Sp. Atk stats increase.
desc.es: Quien lo usa se concentra y potencia su Ataque y su Ataque Especial.

shortDesc: Teaches certain Pokemon the move Work Up. One use.

desc.en: The user shrouds itself in electricity and smashes into its target. This also damages the user a little.
desc.es: Carga eléctrica muy potente que también hiere ligeramente a quien la usa.

shortDesc: Teaches certain Pokemon the move Wild Charge. One use.

desc.en: The user crashes into its target while rotating its body like a drill. Critical hits land more easily.
desc.es: El usuario golpea usando su cuerpo como un taladro. Suele ser crítico.

shortDesc: Teaches certain Pokemon the move Drill Run. One use.

desc.en: The user slams its target with its flame-covered body. The more the user outweighs the target, the greater the move’s power.
desc.es: El usuario ataca con su cuerpo ardiente. Cuanto mayor sea su peso comparado con el del objetivo, más daño causará.

shortDesc: Teaches certain Pokemon the move Heat Crash. One use.

desc.en: The user attacks by wrapping its opponent in a fierce wind that flies up into the sky. This may also confuse the target.
desc.es: Golpea al objetivo con un fuerte torbellino que envuelve al rival y puede confundirlo.

shortDesc: Teaches certain Pokemon the move Hurricane. One use.

desc.en: The user plays rough with the target and attacks it. This may also lower the target’s Attack stat.
desc.es: El Pokémon que lo usa le hace cucamonas al objetivo y lo ataca. Puede disminuir el Ataque del objetivo.

shortDesc: Teaches certain Pokemon the move Play Rough. One use.

desc.en: Opposing Pokémon are drenched in an odd poisonous liquid. This lowers the Attack, Sp. Atk, and Speed stats of a poisoned target.
desc.es: Impregna a su objetivo con un líquido venenoso que disminuye el Ataque, el Ataque Especial y la Velocidad. Solo afecta a Pokémon ya envenenados.

shortDesc: Teaches certain Pokemon the move Venom Drench. One use.

desc.en: The user damages opposing Pokémon by emitting a powerful flash.
desc.es: Inflige daño a los oponentes con una potente luz.

shortDesc: Teaches certain Pokemon the move Dazzling Gleam. One use.

desc.en: The user swings both arms and hits the target. The target’s stat changes don’t affect this attack’s damage.
desc.es: Gira sobre sí mismo y golpea al oponente con ambos brazos. Ignora los cambios en las características del objetivo.

shortDesc: Teaches certain Pokemon the move Darkest Lariat. One use.

desc.en: The user fiercely attacks the target using its entire body.
desc.es: Asesta un golpe devastador usando todo su cuerpo.

shortDesc: Teaches certain Pokemon the move High Horsepower. One use.

desc.en: The user attacks the target’s throat, and the resultant suffering prevents the target from using moves that emit sound for two turns.
desc.es: Inflige al rival un dolor tan abrumador que le impide utilizar durante dos turnos ataques que se sirven del sonido.

shortDesc: Teaches certain Pokemon the move Throat Chop. One use.

desc.en: The user attacks the enemy with a pollen puff that explodes. If the target is an ally, it gives the ally a pollen puff that restores its HP instead.
desc.es: Ataca al oponente con una bola explosiva. Si esta alcanza a un aliado, le hará recuperar PS.

shortDesc: Teaches certain Pokemon the move Pollen Puff. One use.

desc.en: The user bites the target with its psychic capabilities. This can also destroy Light Screen and Reflect.
desc.es: Ataca a sus rivales con poderes psíquicos que además destruyen barreras como Pantalla de Luz y Reflejo.

shortDesc: Teaches certain Pokemon the move Psychic Fangs. One use.

desc.en: The user slams into the target using a full-force blast of water. This may also lower the target’s Defense stat.
desc.es: Ataca golpeando gracias a la fuerza del agua. También puede reducir la Defensa del objetivo.

shortDesc: Teaches certain Pokemon the move Liquidation. One use.

desc.en: The user attacks by slamming its body into the target. The higher the user’s Defense, the more damage it can inflict on the target.
desc.es: El usuario usa el cuerpo para lanzar su ataque e infligir un daño directamente proporcional a su Defensa.

shortDesc: Teaches certain Pokemon the move Body Press. One use.

desc.en: An item to be held by a Pokémon. This spoon is imbued with telekinetic power and boosts Psychic-type moves.
desc.es: Cuchara imbuida de energía telequinética que potencia los movimientos de tipo Psíquico. Debe llevarla un Pokémon.

shortDesc: Holder's Psychic-type attacks have 1.2x power.

desc.en: One of a variety of mysterious Mega Stones. Have Tyranitar hold it, and this stone will enable it to Mega Evolve during battle.
desc.es: Una de las misteriosas Megapiedras. Permite megaevolucionar a Tyranitar en combate.

shortDesc: If held by a Tyranitar, this item allows it to Mega Evolve in battle.

desc.en: An ultra-high-performance Poké Ball that provides a higher success rate for catching Pokémon than a Great Ball.
desc.es: Poké Ball de rendimiento superior. Tiene un índice de éxito mayor al de la Super Ball.

shortDesc: An ultra-performance Ball that provides a higher catch rate than a Great Ball.

shortDesc: The holder ignores rain- and sun-based effects.

desc.es: Joya de un solo uso que potencia los movimientos de tipo Agua. Debe llevarla un Pokémon.

desc.es: Tiene un curioso aroma que potencia los movimientos de tipo Agua. Debe llevarlo un Pokémon.

shortDesc: Holder's Water-type attacks have 1.2x power.

desc.es: Aumenta mucho el Ataque y el Ataque Especial cuando el Pokémon que lo lleva recibe un ataque frente al cual es débil.

shortDesc: If holder is hit super effectively, raises Attack, Sp. Atk by 2 stages. Single use.

desc.es: Un dulce a base de suave y esponjosa nata montada. A cierto Pokémon le encanta.

desc.en: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It will restore any lowered stat in battle. It can be used only once.
desc.es: Restaura cualquier característica reducida en combate. Solo se puede usar una vez. Debe llevarla un Pokémon.

shortDesc: Restores all lowered stat stages to 0 when one is less than 0. Single use.

desc.es: Debe llevarla un Pokémon. Aumenta ligeramente la precisión de los movimientos.

shortDesc: The accuracy of attacks by the holder is 1.1x.

desc.en: If held by a Pokémon, it restores the user’s HP in a pinch, but it will cause confusion if the user hates the taste.
desc.es: Los Pokémon pueden llevarla o usarla para restaurar algunos PS. Su sabor puede causar confusión si no les gusta.

desc.en: An item to be held by a Pokémon. This thick pair of glasses slightly boosts the power of special moves.
desc.es: Potencian ligeramente los ataques especiales. Debe llevarlas un Pokémon.

shortDesc: Holder's special attacks have 1.1x power.

desc.es: Si la lleva un Pokémon, debilita un ataque supereficaz de tipo Hielo de un enemigo.
